item.title: A message from the Main Office:
item.description: Students in grades 10 - 12 Representatives from Service Ontario will be visiting STA on Thursday, May 14th to assist students with applying for a health card or driver's license. To book an appointment, please have your parents access the email sent to them.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Curtis:
item.description: A reminder to students in Grades 7 and 8 interested in writing this year's Waterloo Math Contest that TODAY is the last day to sign up. Please add your name to the sign-up sheet in your math class if you are interested! The contest will take place next Wednesday in the library during Period 1.

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: This is a reminder for all grade 12 students in the building, today is your retreat day. If you are taking the bus to the retreat this morning, you should now be in the atrium. If you are driving yourself, please meet at the Embrun Community Centre at 8:40am. Thank you!

item.title: Attention Drama Club members:
item.description: Today's Drama Club Meeting is rescheduled to tomorrow at lunch in Rm.209

item.title: A message from:
item.description: Mme. Perron Could all Europe Team Members please see Mme Perron and Mrs. Bourdon in Room 125 following announcements to pick up Trivia Night Letters to give to community vendors.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval.
item.description: Reminding Mrs. Longval's Period 3 Grade 9 Physical Education students to meet in Portable 313 for today's health lesson.
